title: Butchery
description: An immersive way of harvesting mobs
body:
![Title](https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/0dfe69bafcb7.png)
![Image](https://cdn.imgchest.com/files/793c6ef076c7.png)

## **🔪 What is Butchery?**

Butchery is a mod that makes harvesting mobs and animals much much more immersive and fun. Whilst simply killing mobs is still an option with this mod installed, you have the added option of kill a mob with the new Butcher's Knife. Killing a mob with the butchers knife will cause the mobs corpse to drop instead of their original loot (with the exception of sheep, they drop their corpse in addition to their wool). Once you've aquired their corpses you're free to start the butchering process.

## **🥩 Features**

Config file to customise the mod to your specific needs
Kill mobs with the new butchers knife to obtain their corpse (You can also use the Butcher enchant or enable any tool/weapon to obtain corpses in the config.
Hang corpses from hooks to drain their blood and begin the butchering process.
Skin corpses - Hang them on skin racks, dampen and cover in salt to obtain leather.
Cut up corpses hanging or on the butchers table to obtain different selections of meat (Farmers Delight food and Vanilla foods can be enabled as an alternative in the config)
Place corpses on the rotisserie and a campfire underneath to cook the meat
Fill a mincer with beef or lamb to obtain the minced version
Use the hammer to break open turtle shells
Various different decoration blocks including barrel of cod/salmon, jar, brain in a jar, singing salmon, head mounts, barrel of bones and more
Functional blocks such as butchers display (storage for food), spike trap (made from elder guardian drop damages and applies mining fatigue on contact)

## **📜 Common Questions**

Q: Will you port to a version BELOW 1.20.1?
A: No, sorry this is not possible for me to do. Butchery will only ever update to newer versions of Forge.

Q: Fabric?
A: No, sorry.

Q: Can I request a compatibility?
A: Sure, head over to the discord and make a thread with your suggestion.

Q: How do I add mobs to the tag files so that they drop carcasses?
A: Download the butchery datapack and follow the guide in the description. You can download it here:
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/butchery-add-mobs-datapack
